title: New Public Stable Version Released!
changes: NEW Implementation of Jira Ticketing System for lyric correction requests [Phase 1]
FIX Meter filter now correctly handles songs with multiple meters (e.g. 6.7.7.7 / C.M) — they appear under each meter group they belong to
NEW Jump to Meter selector — tap the list icon in Meter view to instantly navigate to any meter group
Refresh button is now hidden in Meter view to keep the toolbar clean
For more info on changes, visit https://github.com/Reynold29/CSI-Hymns-and-Lyrics/commits/main/

title: Christmas Update! 🎄
changes: NEW Christmas Mode with festive theming
NEW Christmas Carols section with community-contributed songs
Authenticated users can add their own Christmas carols (lyrics or PDF)
Beautiful snowfall animation and Christmas-themed colors
Toggle Christmas mode in Settings > Special Features
For more info on changes, visit https://github.com/Reynold29/CSI-Hymns-and-Lyrics/commits/main/

title: Sixth Public Stable Version Released!
changes: NEW Option to Sign Up or Login to keep your data and custom collections saved
NEW Custom Categories for your own collections
NEW Order of Service Screen
Order of Service Screen is now available in the Service Page. More content will be added and implemented in the future.
Under-the-hood improvements and bug fixes
For more info on changes, visit https://github.com/Reynold29/CSI-Hymns-and-Lyrics/commits/main/

title: Fifth Public Stable Version Released!
changes: Better Notification Handling
Major UI Improvements
Under-the-hood improvements and bug fixes
For more info on changes, visit https://github.com/Reynold29/CSI-Hymns-and-Lyrics/commits/main/

title: Fourth Public Stable Version Released!
changes:
Welcome Android 16! 
 Integrate Android 16 Goodies
Better notification handling
Better theming engine
Improved songs list and view
Under-the-hood improvements and bug fixes
For more info on changes, visit https://github.com/Reynold29/CSI-Hymns-and-Lyrics/commits/main/

title: Third Public Stable Version Released!
changes:
NEW Hymns and Lyrics Audio Button 

-> Some songs has audio playback support, now you can play the audio of the song.
 Few audio tracks are added for now. Most will be added in the future.
NEW In-App Notifications
Simplify Categories List Labels
Improved Haptic Feedback
For more info on changes, visit https://github.com/Reynold29/CSI-Hymns-and-Lyrics/commits/main/

title: Second Public Stable Version Released!
changes:
NEW Refresh Lyrics Button 

-> The Lyrics can now be dynamically updated, by fetching the latest updated changes from GitHub Repo. 
-> Why this change? Cuz now, there's no need to update the app each time some lyrics are corrected.
NEW Time Metric Filter Option
Simplify Categories List Labels
Improve UI Layout
Added a Top Nav Icon to Navigate to the Top.
For more info on changes, visit https://github.com/Reynold29/CSI-Hymns-and-Lyrics/commits/main/

title: Public Stable Version Released!
changes: Included All Hymns and Keerthane.
Built-In Favorites Button.
Filter Button Added with options to Order Hymns by Number, Alphabetical Order and Signatures.
Included Button to Report Wrong Lyrics.
Fixed UI Overflow Issues, enhancing smaller phones user experience
Improve Search Bar Operations. ( Now you can search using Signatures Too!! )
For more info on changes, visit https://github.com/Reynold29/CSI-Hymns-and-Lyrics/commits/main/

title: Third and Final BETA Released!
changes: NEW Font Size selection Button for every lyrics.
NEW Sidebar Menu with Categories according to events.
Now, you can swipe between the Hymns and Keerthane screens to switch between them.
Added Flaticon icons for song lists in both categories.
For more info on changes, visit https://github.com/Reynold29/CSI-Hymns-and-Lyrics/commits/main/

title: Second Beta Version Released!
changes: Bump version to 2.0.0-beta
Added Filter option:
-> Sort by Hymn Number
-> Sort by Alphabetical Order
APKs / AABs from this release are signed

title: First Beta Version Released!
changes: Two separate categories for Hymns and Lyrics (Keerthane)
Added Dark Mode support
Added 1 song per category for testing purposes for now
Material You Theming included
More changes, features, songs and quality of life updates coming soon!
